status.unconfiguredHint: No scheduled task yet. Create one with this conversation selected.
status.createForTerminal: Create a scheduled task for this terminal
status.defaultPrompt: Every day at 10am, search for the latest AI news, summarize and output an insight report.

confirmDeleteWithConversations: Are you sure you want to delete this scheduled task? All conversations from this task will also be deleted.

detail.executionModeDescriptionNew: Each run starts a fresh conversation, so previous context does not carry over. Best for recurring reports or checks that should stay independent.
detail.executionModeDescriptionExisting: Each run continues in the same conversation, so earlier context and results stay available. Best for follow-up tasks that build on previous runs.
detail.executionModeDescriptionSpecified: Each run reuses the conversation you select below, avoiding a buildup of new conversations.

page.description: Run tasks on a schedule, or start from a conversation with that target already selected.
page.searchPlaceholder: Search by task, conversation, instruction, or schedule
page.awakeBanner: Scheduled tasks only run while your computer is awake.
page.keepAwakeTooltip: When on, Nomi keeps your Mac awake and the screen on while the lid is open. Closing the lid still sleeps it — unless it's plugged in with an external display and an external keyboard/mouse (clamshell mode).
page.scheduleHint: Scheduled tasks use a randomized delay of several minutes for server performance.
page.customCronWarning: This task has a custom schedule that can't be edited here. Changing the frequency will replace it.

form.name: Name
form.promptPlaceholder: Instructions for the agent to execute
form.agentPlaceholder: Select the agent to execute this task
form.executionModeEditHint: Execution mode cannot be changed after creation. Delete and recreate the task to switch modes.
form.workspaceHint: Optional: set a project folder for file operations
form.nomiModelRequired: Please select a model for Nomi
form.specifiedConversationRequired: Please select a conversation to reuse
form.allConversationsBound: All conversations are already bound to other scheduled tasks
form.conversationAlreadyBound: This conversation is already bound to another scheduled task; pick a different one
form.clearContextEachRunHint: Reset the agent context before each run so history does not accumulate across runs. Message records are kept.

cronExpression.subMinuteWarning: Sub-minute schedules fire very frequently and put heavy load on the OS — not recommended.
cronExpression.unsupportedToken: L / W / # are not supported; use * , - / ? and weekday names.

skill.turnIntoSkill: Turn this task into a skill
skill.saveSuccess: Skill saved — future executions will use it

error.alreadyExists: This conversation already has a scheduled task "{{name}}" (ID: {{id}}). Please update the existing task instead of creating a new one.
